# Judy Babinski Photography

> Detroit Metro headshot photographer specializing in professional headshots for business professionals, corporate teams, actors, and personal branding.

## About
Judy Babinski Photography is based in Berkley, MI and serves the greater Detroit Metro area. Judy's goal is to give every client an amazing headshot and an amazing experience — making sure clients feel relaxed, have fun, and leave loving their photos. Judy is a Peter Hurley Headshot Crew Associate Photographer, trained in the industry's leading headshot techniques.

## Services
- Professional headshots for business professionals and executives
- Corporate team headshots (studio and on-location)
- Actor and model headshots
- Personal branding photography

## Location & Service Area
Studio located in Berkley, MI. Serving the Detroit Metro area including Ferndale, Royal Oak, Birmingham, Bloomfield, Farmington, Southfield, and Troy.

## Ideal Clients
Professionals who want a headshot that accurately reflects their professional status and makes a strong first impression — executives, entrepreneurs, business professionals, actors, and models.

## What to Know Before Booking
- Sessions range from $200 for an expedited session to $500+ for a branding series
- Wardrobe guidance provided before your session
- Studio is a relaxed, comfortable environment — no "deer in the headlights" zone
- On-location team sessions available

## Contact
- Website: https://www.judybabinskiphotos.com
- Email: judy@judybabinskiphotos.com
- Phone: (972) 953-6259

## Reviews
5.0/5 stars from 16 reviews on Google

## Notable Achievements
- Peter Hurley Headshot Crew Associate Photographer
- Portraits for Patriots — provided complimentary professional headshots to veterans in the Dallas area
